# takehomepay.ie

> Free Irish salary calculator for 2026.

## Tools

- Take-home pay calculator: income tax (20%/40%), USC, PRSI, tax credits, pension relief
- Supports all filing statuses: single, married (one/two incomes), single parent

## Sources

- Revenue.ie: 2026 tax rates and thresholds
- Citizens Information: employment and tax guidance

## Disclaimer

Estimates only. Not tax advice. Consult Revenue.ie or a tax advisor.
